The Raven doesn’t have HP. If it would take damage, it instead disappears in a plume of black feathers (for now). Wherever you go, the Raven is always there before you.

  • When you Begin a Session if you choose to envision a brief vignette from the perspective of the Raven, instead of taking +1 momentum, if:
    • It spotlights a known NPC, each player takes +1 spirit.
    • It reveals something from a PC’s past, each player takes +2 momentum.
    • It reveals a new danger or obstacle, each player takes +1 on their next move.

  • When you Set a Course by following the Raven while inside a wizard’s Demesne, add +2.

  • When you take this upgrade, the Raven brings you an Item. Take it as an asset for free. When you Continue a Legacy, envision how the Raven finds the new character, and gives them that item as well.
